embeds.title: Apply for BebraLand
embeds.description: Click the button below and answer the questions. Staff will review your application soon

questions.question: Minecraft nickname
questions.placeholder:
Choose carefully.
Changing it later may not be possible.

Use a normal, readable nickname.
Nicknames with offensive words, impersonation, ads, or troll names may be rejected.

If you own Minecraft:
We recommend using your real Java Edition nickname.

questions.question: Why do you want to join BebraLand?
questions.placeholder:
Tell us why you want to join.

What interests you most?
Building, Create, magic, automation, community, events, relaxing survival, etc.

Short answers are okay, just be honest.

questions.question: What kind of player are you?
questions.placeholder:
Tell us about your playstyle.

Builder?
Technical player?
Magic mods?
Explorer?
Casual survival?
Do you like helping others or playing mostly solo?

questions.question: Tell us about yourself
questions.placeholder:
You can tell us:
• Age
• Languages
• Timezone/country
• Past server experience
• Hobbies/interests

You do not need to share private information.

questions.question: Rules confirmation
questions.placeholder:
Confirm that you read the rules and agree to follow them.

BebraLand is a friendly private community.
We expect respect, maturity, and common sense.
